privileged_info_summary: Task sepia_tone@1 uses real data from Unsplash images (accessible and verified as valid RGB JPEGs). The task requires converting a color photograph to sepia tone using GIMP's Desaturate and Colorize tools. Pass threshold is 75% based on 5 verification criteria: RGB hierarchy (R>G>B), valid RGB ratios (R/G: 1.05-1.35, G/B: 1.02-1.25), warm hue percentage (≥70% in 20-50° range), appropriate saturation (10-50%), and meaningful image change (>10% pixels modified by >20 intensity). Standard sepia tone has hue at 30° with saturation typically 20-40%. Task has 120-second timeout and maximum 8 steps.
